headline: EDITOR'S PICK
title: Make your desktop move.
subtitle: Wallnetic brings GPU-accelerated live video wallpapers to macOS — with per-display control, smart battery management, and a curated library. Your Mac has never looked this alive.

headline: COMMUNITY FAVORITE
title: Put a price tag on your time.
subtitle: paus translates every price into hours worked, turning impulse buys into intentional decisions. Set pause reminders, track your wins, and watch your savings grow.

headline: HIDDEN GEM
title: Share a secret. Then watch it vanish.
subtitle: SecretDrop encrypts your passwords and credentials into self-destructing one-time links — no sign-up, no trace, no second thoughts. The safest way to send the unsendable.

headline: JUST SHIPPED
title: Client feedback that actually makes sense.
subtitle: ReviseFlow lets clients click directly on your live site to leave pixel-perfect annotations, and AI reads the feedback and opens a fix PR — all without a single email thread.
